title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 517.051 - When case to be tried
text:
517.051.  When case to be tried. — Every case shall be tried upon the return date of the summons, when the summons has been duly and timely served, or on a date to which the case has been continued.
(L. 1985 S.B. 5, et al.) 
Effective 1-01-87
